queries.question: What novels have John Smith and what short stories have the same character?
queries.sql:
SELECT Novels.title
FROM Novels
WHERE Novels.Character = "John Smith"
UNION
SELECT ShortStories.title
FROM ShortStories
WHERE ShortStories.Character = "John Smith"

queries.question: Show novels and short stories about John Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Novels.title
FROM Novels
UNION
SELECT ShortStories.title
FROM ShortStories
WHERE ShortStories.Character = "John Smith"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show novels and short stories about John Smith.
